response.justification: Candidate currently holds a Staff title at an AI-focused company and contributes to MCP/agentic tooling, which aligns well with the AI-native engineering mindset. Strong polyglot background and prior high-throughput experience at Sociomantic (millions of HTTP requests/second) support the distributed systems requirement. However, Python — a must-have — is absent from the listed skills and employment history, and explicit evidence of stakeholder management at scale or formal technical-strategy leadership is thin. Worth a screening call to verify Python depth and strategic scope before committing to a full loop.
strengths: Current Staff role at re:cinq with hands-on AI-agent and MCP tooling experience
Proven high-throughput distributed systems work at Sociomantic/Dunnhumby
Strong TypeScript/Node.js foundation plus broad polyglot adaptability
concerns: Python not listed in skills or work history despite being a must-have
Limited explicit evidence of cross-functional stakeholder management at Staff scope
AI/LLM product exposure is recent and narrow (mainly current role)
